reviews.comment:
Despacha combustibles y lubricantes YPF, hacen cambios de aceite, tiene bar y dos puestos de carga de aire. Hay baños públicos bien mantenidos y venta de mapas y guías de ruta. Suele tener cola de espera en la calle, que se dificulta por su ubicación cercana a varias esquinas.

(Translated by Google)
It sells YPF fuel and lubricants, offers oil changes, has a bar, and two air conditioning refill stations. There are well-maintained public restrooms and a shop selling maps and route guides. There's usually a line outside, made more difficult by its location near several intersections.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNMThMVUFREAE
